rationale: Spec coverage is exact. All ten requirements (R1-R9 + R3b) map to a single bead each via the requirement->bead map, matching the layered 1->2->3 DAG. Every spec AC1-AC10 (checklist order) traces to a verification command that exists with the identical string, and the Provenance table names test functions matching the spec's AC names. All FOUR spec-approve round-2 carry-forwards are genuinely folded and traceable to file: #1 exact-set via TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet, #2 value-fidelity in the Manual e2e, #3 three-form indirection grep, #4 no-plan-action disposition. No scope creep: the plan pins the 112 boundary precisely (111 reads no 112 symbol; consumes only 109 surfaces), all bead file paths sit inside spec Scope, and every Non-Goal / Out-of-Scope item is respected. One minor framing imprecision (112 listed as a hard prerequisite the spec never named) is a rebase-ordering note, not un-specced consumption.
findings: R1-R9 + R3b each map to exactly one bead (plan Requirement->bead map, work_chunks depends_on 1->2->3); no requirement dropped or double-assigned.

Every spec AC (spec.md 108-117) has a matching verification with an identical command: AC1->B2 diff -q; AC2/AC3->B1; AC4/AC5/AC6/AC7->B2; AC8/AC9->B3 (plugins + .claude mirror greps); AC10->per-bead build + plan-time regression. Provenance rows all point at checks that exist.

Carry-forward #1 (AC4 exact-set gap): folded as TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet extracting the literal ALLOWED_CLI array and asserting set-equality to the four commands (Testing Strategy 170-184, B2 step 6, verification 484); B2 AC correctly elevates AC4 to the exactly-four guarantee.
Carry-forward #2 (verdict-VALUE fidelity): folded in B2 Manual e2e step 2 (493) - re-emitted verdict value diffed against the .codex.log source; Provenance 685 names it.

Carry-forward #3 (dynamic mindspec ${VERB} indirection): folded as a three-form grep (mindspec ${, backtick template, string concat) inside the exact-set test (180-184, 466-467) - appropriately handled as a test rather than an un-editable approved-spec change.
Carry-forward #4 (../../adr/ relative-link): correctly dispositioned as no-plan-action - the plan cites ADRs by ID in frontmatter+prose, writes no such links (655-659).

112 boundary pinned as the BRIEF requires (628-632): 111 consumes only 109 surfaces (runner:, panel: mix, substitution.claude_sub_on_quota); no gates:/substitutes/panel.Panel.Gate consumption; post-112 rebase claimed clean fast-forward.

Non-Goals + Out-of-Scope all respected: no mindspec complete (structurally pinned via ALLOWED_CLI exclusion + AC4), no platform output-schema claim, no telemetry (ADR-0027 evaluated-not-cited), claude-code-skills path retained-not-deleted, external is a doc stub, no signing.

MINOR (info, non-blocking): plan 608 lists specs 109/110/112 as hard prerequisites tagged '(spec Open Questions, resolved)', but the spec's Open Question (147) names only 109 and 110; the 112 add is correctly attributed to the model-tiering protocol in the following clause (614) and is a rebase-ordering note with zero symbol consumption, so it is not scope creep - only a slight header over-attribution.
